author: Brandon Bachmeier
name: Better Media v2
description: Phase 6 — adds the lyrics list. Fetches synced lyrics from LRClib via the host on track change, parses the LRC, inserts ♪ markers in instrumental gaps, renders all lines as DOM, and on every 200ms tick computes the current line + smooth-scrolls it into view. This is the heaviest DOM phase — many <div> children + per-tick class swaps + smooth scrollTo.
